message:
🧹 Replace raw hex colors and fontSize values in chart files with shared constants (#10260) (#10265)

Extract 20 raw hex color literals and 93 raw fontSize values from chart
and card component files into shared constants from lib/constants/ui.ts.

New constants added: CHART_TEXT_WHITE, CHART_TEXT_MUTED,
CHART_AXIS_FONT_SIZE (10), CHART_AXIS_FONT_SIZE_SM (9),
CHART_BODY_FONT_SIZE (12), CHART_BODY_FONT_SIZE_SM (10).

Ratchet baselines lowered:
  raw-hex:       282 → 262 (−20)
  raw-font-size:  96 →   3 (−93)

Fixes #10260

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
